visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, wearing a gray patterned flat cap and a white t-shirt, stands in a crowded exhibition hall. He smiles broadly and gestures with his hands toward the camera. In the background, there are blurred figures of other attendees and exhibition booths. Bright indoor lighting illuminates the scene. A green text overlay appears at the bottom with Chinese characters and the word 'COMPUTEX'. (2) The man walks through the venue, and the camera follows him. He passes by a large green spherical balloon with the 'AGI' logo. The environment is a typical large-scale convention center with high ceilings and various branded booths. He stops in front of a white and green display area belonging to AGI, pointing toward the brand name. (3) The camera focuses on specific electronic products on display. Close-up shots show portable SSDs labeled 'EDM38' and 'EDM38 Pro' resting on a white surface. The man's hands enter the frame, pointing at the product details and capacity labels like '4TB'. The background objects include floral arrangements and promotional posters. (4) The man continues his presentation while standing near a display of Gen5 SSDs in various metallic colors like gold and rose gold. He uses animated facial expressions and hand movements to convey excitement. (5) An interface overlay showing an Instagram profile for 'agi_technology' appears on the screen. The man points toward it while talking directly to the lens. The lighting remains bright and consistent, typical of a studio or well-lit event space.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Slogan]: COMPUTEX 逛什麼?. (2) [Subtitle]: 嘿! COMPUTEX. [Subtitle]: 跟著我就對了. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為國民乾爹 黃仁勳又來了. (4) [Logo]: AGI. [Slogan]: EDM38 Pro. [Variety]: 更快. [Variety]: 容量更大. (5) [Slogan]: 4TB. [Slogan]: MicroSD Express Card. [Slogan]: TF338. [Variety]: 完全支援. [Variety]: 沒有問題. (6) [Slogan]: AI-Ready Gen5 SSD. [Slogan]: Project P14. [Logo]: agi_technology.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting, approximately 7 other attendees visible in the background throughout the exhibition hall shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short dark hair, wearing a gray flat cap with a subtle pattern, round-framed glasses, and a plain white crew-neck t-shirt. He wears a smartwatch on his left wrist and multiple beaded bracelets on his right.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves through various sections of the COMPUTEX exhibition hall, featuring high-tech branded booths (notably AGI), glass display cases with storage hardware, large promotional balloons, and crowds of industry professionals and visitors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks energetically with a high pitch variability and fast tempo. Background music is an upbeat electronic track with a driving beat. A sudden whoosh SFX occurs during a visual scene change. The acoustic environment has a subtle room tone consistent with a large indoor space. (2) The speaker introduces the event with high vocal arousal. A camera shutter sound effect triggers a transition. The music remains constant in the background, providing a vibrant atmosphere. Low crowd murmurs are barely perceptible beneath the primary signal. (3) The vocal switches to a descriptive, professional narrative tone while maintaining excitement. Rapid speech rate continues as he details product features. Sharp 'pop' SFXs emphasize the appearance of text overlays on screen. The music's synthetic textures are prominent but mixed lower than the voice. (4) Vocal intensity rises as the speaker announces specific giveaways and rewards. A final upbeat musical stinger swells briefly before the audio concludes with a clean hard cut. The overall master track is bright with high spectral clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Exhibition Introduction -> Product Detail Showcase -> CTA / Promotion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional vlog for the AGI brand during the COMPUTEX 2024 exhibition. The host, a known tech influencer, uses his energetic persona to highlight new storage products such as high-capacity portable SSDs and specialized MicroSD cards, ultimately encouraging viewers to follow the brand's social media for a chance to win prizes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host specifically visits the AGI booth, showcases their new products with close-ups of specifications, and promotes an official giveaway on AGI's Instagram page.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media editing style with fast cuts and colorful text overlays to engage a tech-savvy audience. The presence of well-known industry figures like Jensen Huang is mentioned to build context and excitement around the event.
